## Our Vision

To be a top class institution for the pursuit of excellence in knowledge , character and service to humanity.

## Our Mission

To provide a conducive environment for teaching, learning, research and development, where staff and students will interact and compete effectively with their counterparts globally.

Updates from across the university and beyond

## FUTURE-READY: The Vice Chancellor's Vision

## “To build the most innovative and entrepreneurial university in Africa among the top 200 globally, yielding inquiring minds as well as discoveries that are locally and globally impactful.”

## Professor Folasade T. Ogunsola

MBChB, FMCPath, FWACP, FRCPath (UK) PhD (Cardiff) FNAMed, FAMedS, FAS

## UNILAG at a Glance

For over six decades, UNILAG has provided qualitative and research-oriented education to Nigerians and all those who have entered its domain in search of knowledge.

[Our illustrious History](https://unilag.edu.ng/unilag-historical-odyssey/)

Our establishment by an Act of Parliament

## The UNILAG Library

## When you come to UNILAG to join any of our Schools and Colleges

You become a part of our legacy of impactful knowledge and cutting-edge research. Experience the epitome of educational distinction. We don’t just educate; we inspire, innovate, and cultivate brilliance.

[Visit UNILAG Library](https://unilag.edu.ng/the-library/)

## To UNILAG

University of First Choice and the Nation’s Pride
